metadata.name: Counterparty Credit Assessment Requirements
metadata.description: Ensures counterparties undergo proper credit assessment

rules.name: Credit rating assigned
rules.description: Counterparty must have internal credit rating
rules.remediation: Complete credit assessment and assign internal rating

rules.name: Financial statements current
rules.description: Financial statements must be less than 18 months old
rules.remediation: Obtain updated financial statements from counterparty

rules.name: KYC documentation complete
rules.description: Know Your Customer documentation must be complete
rules.remediation: Complete KYC documentation for the counterparty

rules.name: Investment grade handling
rules.description: Sub-investment grade counterparties require enhanced due diligence
rules.remediation: Complete enhanced due diligence for sub-investment grade counterparty

rules.name: Default probability within limits
rules.description: Probability of default must be within acceptable range
rules.remediation: Review counterparty relationship for counterparties with PD > 10%
